pi_items.source: Found in setup_task.sh which creates the environment at this directory.
Executing pytest --collect-only on the generated tests shows 9 test functions, contrary to the author's comment 'We created 10 tests/assertions roughly'.
Found in verifier.py where passed = score >= 60.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic autograder project located in /home/ga/PycharmProjects/autograder. Although the metadata claims 10 tests exist, pytest collects exactly 9 tests. To successfully complete the task, the agent must fix 4 specific bugs to achieve a score of at least 60 points and have all tests pass without modifying the test files.
